reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저희집강아지가 너무좋아해요 ㅎㅎ.털고 집어던지고 뜯고난리에요 ㅎㅎㅎ 구매할까 말까하다가 이벤트하길래.바로구매햇는데.완전만족입니당
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves it hehe. She's carrying it around, throwing it, and chewing on it like crazy hehe. I was going back and forth on whether to buy it, but then there was an event so I just went ahead and purchased it right away. I'm completely satisfied!

reviews.name: 별****
reviews.content:
처음에는 간식도 못찾고 꺼내달라고 낑낑댔는데 지금은 곧잘 합니다. 구석구석 숨겨놓으면 좀 찾기 어렵긴하겠더라구요 ㅎㅎ  두뇌와 후각발달에 도움될것같아요.
디자인도 이쁘고 생일버전이라서 생일선물로 사줬어요. 오자마자 손세탁하고 줬습니다
reviews.content_en: At first, she couldn't find the treats and kept whining for me to take them out, but now she's doing well with it. When I hide them in the corners, it does seem a bit harder for her to find hehe. I think it'll help with brain and scent development. The design is also pretty, and since it's the birthday version, I got it as a birthday gift. I hand-washed it as soon as it arrived before giving it to her.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
어머나 정말 너무너무 귀여워요^^*
일단 간식을 넣을 공간이 너무 많아서 좋구요 하나하나 찾아먹는 재미에 아이들도 시간 가는줄 몰라요~~~
지금까지 샀던 노즈워크 장난감중 제일 오래가지고 놀고 구성이 너무 귀엽게 예쁘게 만들어져 있어서 저도 간식 넣는 재미가 있습니다^^ 다음번에 다른 시리즈도 구매해야겠어요^^
reviews.content_en: Oh my gosh, it's seriously so so cute^^* First of all, there's so much space to put treats, which is great, and the kids don't even notice time passing as they search for treats one by one~~~ Of all the nose work toys I've bought so far, this is the one she plays with the longest, and it's designed so adorably and prettily that I even have fun putting treats in it^^ I think I need to buy other series next time too^^

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 어떤 장난감보다 노즈워크 장난감을 젤 좋아하는 댕댕이랍니다 😊 기존에 런치박스 플레이북만 샀었는데 너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 시리즈별로 구매해봤어요! 런치박스<스카우트<마이버스데이 순으로 난이도가 더 어려워지는 것 같더라구요 하지만 저희 댕댕이는 마이버스데이를 제일 선호해요 ㅋㅋㅋ 평소에 장난감 파괴 안시키는 아인데 하루종일 물고다니고 자기 전까지 물고다녀서 뜯어진 부분이 한두군데가 아니랍니다 😭 그만큼 좋아하고 또 노즈워크 하기에 최적화 되어있는 장난감이라 그런게 아닐까 싶어요! 장난감 맛집 바잇미 믿고 구매한 보람이 있습니댜 😋💛
reviews.content_en: My pup loves nose work toys more than any other toy 😊 I used to only buy the Lunch Box Playbook, but she plays with it so well that I ended up buying the whole series! It seems like Lunch Box < Scout < My Birthday increases in difficulty, but my pup prefers My Birthday the most lol She doesn't usually destroy toys, but she carried this around all day long and even before bed, so there are quite a few torn spots 😭 I think it's because she loves it so much and because this toy is optimized for nose work! It was totally worth buying from BITE ME, the toy specialty shop 😋💛

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content:
바잇미 노즈워크 시리즈를 다 갖게 되서 좋네요!!
재입고되서 너무 좋아요~. 스카우트랑 런치박스도 최애 장난감이지만 한 층 더 업그레이드되서 마이버스데이도 최애템에 등극할 것 같네요. 까까냄새도 없는데 주자마자 이 것만 갖고 노는데 신기해요. 역시 강아지도 뉴아이템이 좋은가봐요... ㅎㅎ 결국 애미 지갑은 털립니다 ㅎㅎㅎ. 부피도 안 차지하는데 구성도 알차서 자꾸 구매하게 되네요~.
reviews.content_en: I'm so happy I got the whole BITE ME nose work series!! I'm so glad it's back in stock~. Scout and Lunch Box are my favorites too, but My Birthday seems like it's going to join the favorites list with one more level of upgrade. There's no weird smell, but as soon as I gave it to her, she only plays with this, which is amazing. I guess dogs really do like new items... hehe My wallet gets emptied anyway hehe. It doesn't take up much space, and the composition is well-packed, so I keep buying more~.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
전에 런치타임 플레이북, 스카우트 플레이북 샀는데 아기가 너무 잘놀아서 이번에 버스데이 새로 나왔길래 바로 구매했어요 ◡̈ 설날 껴있어서 오래걸릴 줄 알았는데 배송도 설날 끝나고 바로 와서 너무 감사했습니당~
시리즈가 뒤로갈수록 퀄리티가 너무 좋아져서 플레이북 또 다른 시리즈 나오면 계속 구매할 예정입니다!
아기가 노즈워크를 너무 빨리해서 다른 노즈워크 장난감은 2-3분이면 끝났는데 플레이북은 5분 이상 걸리는 거 같아요! 사주길 너무 잘한 거 같아요! 조만간 플레이북 넣을 책장도 하나 사줘야겠어요~ 처음에는 책 여는 찍찍이를 못열어서 어려워했는데 세 번째인 마이버스데이 노즈워크 주니까 바로 입으로 책 찍찍이 떼고 손으로 책 펴서 바로 열고 노네요ㅎㅎ 손으로 책 피는 거는 어디서 배웠는지..😅 너무 웃기고 귀여워서 동영상 첨부합니다ㅎㅎ 플레이북이 강아지를 위해 만들어진 제품이지만 저희까지 만족시키는 제품같아요~ 색깔부터 그림까지 제 맘에 쏙 듭니다! 
마침 곧 아기 생일이어서 미리 생일선물로 마이버스데이 플레이북 줬어요~ 런치타임, 스카우트 플레이북 있다고 마이버스데이 안사주시려는 분들! 저 믿고 아기 꼭 사주세요! 이전 플레이북이랑은 노즈워크 부분이 어려워져서 아기가 재밌게 놀 수 있을거예요! 아기에게 좋은 선물 해줄 수 있게 해주신 바잇미 너무 감사합니다◡̈❤️

🐶 : 이거 내건대 엄청재 미따 ㅋㅋ 어이 강아지 칭구드!!! 나 밋고 누나 헝아한태 사달라고해 바🐶 나 이거 하고 잣는대 꿈애서 마이버수대이 하눙 거 껏서 ㅋㅋ 자면서도 행보카고 시프면 누나헝 아한태 말ㄹ해💓 너히드른 얘브고 귀ㅣ여어서 사주거야 ~ 헝아 밋고 사 ~ 헝아 조금 똑독한 편인대 이거 좀 어려어! 플래이북으로 곤부 더 열시미하거야. 그리고 마스크 잘 스고 다녀 코요나 조시매. 헝아는 이만 마저 못탄 플래이북 곤부 하러 가게~ 아녕 잘지내 ~
reviews.content_en:
I bought Lunch Time Playbook and Scout Playbook before, and my baby played with them so well that when Birthday just came out, I bought it right away ◡̈ I thought it would take a while because of Lunar New Year, but the delivery came right after the holiday ended, so I was so grateful~ The quality gets so much better as the series goes on, so if they release other Playbook series, I plan to keep buying! My baby does nose work so fast that other nose work toys are done in 2-3 minutes, but Playbook seems to take over 5 minutes! I'm so glad I got it! I think I need to buy a bookshelf to put the Playbook in soon~ At first, she had trouble opening the Velcro on the book, but when I gave her My Birthday Nose Work for the third time, she immediately peeled off the Velcro with her mouth and opened the book with her paws and started playing hehe I wonder where she learned to open the book with her paws..😅 It was so funny and cute that I'm attaching a video hehe The Playbook is made for dogs, but it seems to satisfy us too~ I love everything from the colors to the pictures!
Since her birthday is coming up soon, I gave her My Birthday Playbook as an early birthday gift~ For those of you who have Lunch Time and Scout Playbook and are hesitating about My Birthday! Trust me and definitely get it for your baby! The nose work part is more difficult than the previous Playbooks, so your baby will have a fun time playing! Thank you so much BITE ME for letting me give my baby such a great gift◡̈❤️

🐶: This is mine and it's sooo cool lol Hey dog friends!!! Trust me and ask your big sister to buy it for you bar🐶 I play with this and I even dream about doing My Birthday hehe While I'm sleeping I keep dreaming about it and if I wake up I tell my big sister sis💓 You're other cute things so I'll get it for you ~ Sister trust me and get it ~ Sister I'm pretty smart but this is kind of hard! I'm gonna study harder with the Playbook. And I wear my mask well, be careful of Corona. Sister I gotta go finish the Playbook I couldn't do~ Bye take care ~

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content:
저희 강아지 첫 생일이라 사줬는데
정말 생일 선물로 딱!!입니당
한장한장 노즈워크 할곳도 많고, 혼자 펼쳐가며 노는 모습 보니까 너무 뿌듯하고 귀여워서 한참을 웃었네요💟
reviews.content_en: I got it for my dog's first birthday and it's absolutely perfect as a birthday gift!! There are lots of places to do nose work on each page, and seeing her play by opening it up herself was so rewarding and cute that I laughed for a while💟

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 3개 다 샀고든요. 얘가 제일 다양하고 난이도가 있습니다. 오래 해요. 노즈워크 자주 시켜주는데 이걸 7월초에 샀거든요. 얼마나 자주 했으면 헤졌어욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 그만큼 좋아합니다. 버스데이 강추
reviews.content_en: I bought all 3 of them. This one is the most varied and challenging. It lasts a long time. I do nose work frequently, and I bought this in early July. I can't believe how often I did it that it got torn lololol She loves it that much. Birthday version is highly recommended.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 요거요거 진짜 최고예요. 플레이북 두개 있는데 끝판왕인 것 같아요,, 어쩜 이렇게 잘 만드셨는지 놀라워요! 특히 폭죽? 있는 부분은 보자마자 감탄했어요ㅋㅋㅋ 짱짱. 제가 집에서 일을 하는 사람이라 애가 저 일 끝날 때까지 기다리면서 노즈워크 자주 하는데 요거 잘 사용할 것 같아요💓 고마워요 바잇미💓
reviews.content_en: This is seriously the best. I have two Playbooks, but this one seems like the final boss,, I'm amazed at how well it's made! Especially the part with the fireworks? I was amazed the moment I saw it lol So good. I work from home, so my pup waits for me to finish work and does nose work often, and I think I'll use this well 💓 Thank you BITE ME 💓

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
울집 멍멍이 혼자둘 때 필요한 노즈워크 장난감
바잇미거 4개 전부 가지고 있는데 처음 삿던 두개는 이미 걸레짝되서 두개 추가로 삿어요 간식 안넣어줘도 혼자서 미친듯이 물어 뜯고 냄새맡고 이만원 아깝지 않아요 혼자두고 잠시 외출할 때 간식 넣어주면 노즈워크홀릭 장난 아니에요 다른 종류도 만들어주세요 전부 살게요
reviews.content_en: A nose work toy my pup needs when left alone. I have all 4 BITE ME toys, and the first two I bought are already worn out, so I bought 2 more. Even without treats, she goes crazy chewing, biting, and sniffing it. For 20,000 won it's totally worth it. When I leave her alone and go out for a bit, if I put treats in it, she becomes a nose work addict, no joke. Please make other types too. I'll buy everything.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
이 노즈워크 책 시리즈 거의 다 구입한 것 같은데 이번에는 마이버스데이 구입해봤습니다. 내용 구성도 알차고 간식 넣을 수 있는 곳도 다양하게 있어요!
그리고 상당히 튼튼합니다. 몇 번 놀이하고 세탁기에 빨아쓰면 돼서 아주 만족해요.
이거 한번 만들어주면 꽤 오랫동안 갖고 놉니다 ㅎㅎ 새로운 시리즈 계속 만들어주세요 사장님~!
reviews.content_en: I think I've bought almost the entire NOSE WORK book series, and this time I got MY BIRTHDAY! The content is well-organized and there are lots of different places to hide treats! Plus, it's super durable. After playing a few times and washing it in the machine, it's good as new—I'm really satisfied. Once you set it up, my pup plays with it for quite a long time haha Please keep making new series, boss~!

reviews.name: 새****
reviews.content:
간식 바라기 애기여서 매번 달라고 조르는데 그냥.주는것보다 놀이로 스트레스도 해소 되라고 구매하자마자 사용해봤어요 찍찍이가 엄청 쎈편이아니라 처음 사용하는데에서도 막힘없이 잘 사용하고 혼자서 숨겨 놓은 간식도 다.찾아서 잘 먹었어요 ㅋㅋㅋ책이 침범벅이 될정도로 환장하네용 
간식 넣을곳도 많고 적당히 어려워서 오래가지고 놀아서 너무 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My pup is always begging for treats, so instead of just giving them, I bought this to help with stress relief through play. The velcro isn't too strong, so there were no issues even on first use, and she found and ate all the hidden treats on her own haha She's totally obsessed—the book is getting covered in slobber! There are lots of pockets for treats and the difficulty level is just right, so she plays with it for ages. I love it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
런치박스 너무 잘써서 또 샀어용!
넣는 포켓이 더 많은것 같아요
지금은 짱짱한데 곧 다 뜯기겠죠..?ㅎㅎ
하다가 잠들었길래 치우려니까 벌떡 일어나서 또 해요ㅠ
플레이북 시리즈가 소형견들이 하기 딱 좋은 사이즈 같아요
살까말까했는데 무조건이네요!
아이들이 좋아해요!ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: We love the lunch box so much I bought another one! It seems like there are even more pockets this time. It's still pristine now but it'll be shredded soon haha He fell asleep mid-play and when I tried to put it away he jolted awake to keep going ㅠ The PLAYBOOK series seems like the perfect size for small breeds. I was on the fence but it's a definite yes! The kids love it! haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
간식 숨길 곳이 많고 많은것 뿐 아니라 찍찍이로 가려져 있어서 쉽게 못 찾습니다ㅋㅋ그래서 오래 가지고 놀아요 엄청 좋아하네요 제일 좋아하는 것 같습니다 아침에 저 장난감 앞에서 자는건지 뭐하는건지 엎드려있는 거 보고 빵터졌어요ㅋㅋ(원래는 안저래요) 

+
정말 너무너무 좋아해요ㅠㅠㅋㅋ아침에 일어나서 저것만 가지고 놀아요ㅋㅋㅜㅜ만들어주셔서 감사하단 말까지 하고 싶어서 추가 리뷰남깁니닼ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
There are tons of places to hide treats and it's covered with velcro so it's hard to find them haha So my pup plays with it for a long time and absolutely loves it. It seems to be her favorite. I cracked up watching her lying in front of this toy in the morning—I have no idea if she was sleeping or what! haha (She doesn't usually do that)

+
She really really loves it ㅠㅠㅋㅋ She plays with nothing but this when she wakes up in the morning ㅋㅋㅜㅜ I even wanted to leave an additional review to say thank you for making it! ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
노즈위크 플레이북 처음 구입했는데 너무 좋네요
구입하려고  고민했는데 진작 사줄걸 후회했어요 ㅎㅎ
재질도 튼튼하고 좋아서  안심되고  부피는 작은데  여러가지 노즈워크 를  할수 있게  되있어서  실용적이에요  다른 노즈워크주면  금방끝내는데  애기가 정말 한참  잘 가지고 놀더라구요
다른 시리즈도  재구매  하려해요
reviews.content_en: This was my first NOSE WORK PLAYBOOK purchase and I love it! I was hesitant to buy it but now I regret not getting it sooner haha The material is durable and sturdy so I feel confident using it. The size is compact but it has lots of different nosework activities, which makes it very practical! My pup finishes other nosework toys quickly, but with this one she plays for a really long time. I'm planning to repurchase other series too!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
진짜 너무너무 귀여워요 책 자체도 귀여운데
이거 가지고노는 강아지가 너무너무 기엽고
간식 넣어줄곳이 많아서 너무 좋고 ㅠ
이걸 꺼낼수있나? 싶지만 생각보다 똑똑한 강쥐한테
이건 아무것도 아닌..... 일단 첫구매딜로 사봤는데
나중에 더 어려운 버전도 사줘보고싶어요 ㅎㅎㅎ
계속 계속 새로 나오면 좋겠어여.. 진ㅊㅑ 너무조아함

특히 천 종류에 환장하는 울집 강아지에게 취향저격입니댯
reviews.content_en:
It's just too cute! The book itself is adorable and watching my puppy play with it is even cuter! There are so many places to hide treats which is great ㅠ I wasn't sure if she'd be able to get them out, but my smart little pup made quick work of it... I bought it as a first-time deal but I definitely want to get a harder version later! haha I hope new versions keep coming out. She seriously loves it!

Especially since my pup is obsessed with fabric—this hits the mark perfectly!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
수술하고 울타리 생활할 때 아이가 너무 답답해보여서 선물해줬더니 아주 환장했어요 ㅎㅎ (지금은 완쾌! 👍)
밸크로도 있고 나름 난이도가 있어서 처음에는 잘 못 찾고 꽤 오래 걸렸어요
한달 넘게 지난 지금은 달인이 다 돼서 금방 찾아먹지만요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
디자인이 너무 귀엽고 페이지마다 다 다르게 돼있고 난이도도 적당해서 좋았어요
노즈워크 장난감으로 진짜 최고예요
reviews.content_en: When my pup had surgery and was stuck in a pen, she looked so bored that I gave her this as a gift and she went crazy for it haha (She's all better now! 👍) There's velcro and a decent difficulty level so she couldn't find the treats right away and it took quite a while. Now that a month has passed she's become an expert and finds them quickly haha But the design is so cute and each page is different with a good difficulty level. This is seriously the best nosework toy!

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content:
너무너무 귀여워요~ 친구들 선물주려고 선물세트 만들고 있어요 ㅋ
선물주면 다들 바잇미에 완전 사랑에 빠질거같아요. 배송도 빠르고 좋은기회에 예쁜 인형 선물줄수 있어서 제가 더 기분이 좋네용
reviews.content_en: It's so so cute~ I'm putting together gift sets to give to friends! haha Everyone is going to fall completely in love with BITE ME. The shipping was fast and I'm happy I got the chance to give a cute toy as a gift. I'm in a great mood!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 디자인이 너무 귀여운 노즈워크!! 주변에서 많이 봤는데 정작 울애기는 없어서 구매해봤어요~ 생각보다 난이도가 있는편이라고 느껴져서 더 만족했구요! 쉽게 질리진않을것같아요~ 다만 처음에 딱 열었을때 끈적한 부분들이 있어서 아쉬웠어요.. 인체에 무해하긴하지만서도 초콤 그렇잖아욤 강쥐가 잘 갖고놀길 바래봅니당
reviews.content_en: Such a cute nosework design!! I'd seen it around a lot but my pup didn't have one so I bought it~ I was even more satisfied because it has more of a challenge than I expected! I don't think she'll get bored with it easily~ The only thing is that when I first opened it there were some sticky parts which was a shame... It's non-toxic but still, you know? I hope my puppy enjoys playing with it!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 생일맞이해서 선물로 사줬는데 속지까지 하나하나 다 너무 이쁘고 고퀄이에요ㅠㅠ 감동입니다🐶
reviews.content_en: I got it as a birthday gift and it's so beautiful down to every single page—the quality is amazing ㅠㅠ I'm so touched! 🐶

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
저희집 애기가 노즈워크 매니아거든요 집에 노즈워크 장난감이 수십개 있을정도.. 
이가격에 이정도 다양한 놀이를 할 수 있는건 가성비 정말 좋아요 
근데 제품설명에 약하게 손세탁하고 약하게 건조시키라고 되어있는데 안에 구조가 복잡하다보니까 귀찮아서 세탁기에 돌렸더니 끈부분이 바로 이렇게 다 풀려버리더라고요 침이 많이 묻으니까 자주빠는데 이렇게 되면 무조건 손세탁만 해야겠어요..
끈부분을 옷에달린 끈같은 재질에 끝부분 마감처리를 하거나 아님  천재질이었으면 더 좋았을 거 같네요.. ㅠ 그부분 빼고는 만족스럽습니다
reviews.content_en: My pup is a nose work fanatic - we have dozens of these toys at home! For this price, the variety of play options is really great value. But the product description says to hand wash gently and air dry, and since the internal structure is complex, I lazily threw it in the washing machine and all the strings came undone right away 😅 Since it gets a lot of saliva on it and needs frequent washing, I guess I'll have to stick to hand washing from now on. It would've been better if the strings were made with the same material as clothing strings with proper finishing at the ends, or if they were fabric instead. Other than that, I'm satisfied!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 런치박스를 잘 가지고 놀아서 이것도 구매했어요. 난이도가 전에 비해 높은 편이고 숨길 곳이 많아 좋아요. 사실 우리 강아지는 명석하지 않은 건지 찍찍이는 절대 못 열고 책장 사이로 코 박고 킁킁거려요. 적당한 때에 제가 열어줘야 먹을 수 있어요.
reviews.content_en: My pup loves the Lunch Box, so I got this one too. The difficulty level is higher than before and there are lots of hiding spots, which is great. Honestly, my dog isn't the sharpest tool in the shed - she can't open the velcro at all and just sticks her nose between the book pages and sniffs around. She needs me to open it for her at the right moment before she can eat.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
뜯어서 보여준 순간부터 너무 좋아해요!! 
간식을 다 먹은 후에도 한참을 가지고 놀고..간식 더 넣어달라고 조르고 ㅎㅎㅎ
퀄리티가 좋은 장난감이에요 추천합니다!
reviews.content_en: She absolutely loves it from the moment I showed her the unpackaged toy!! Even after eating all the treats, she plays with it for a long time... and keeps begging for more treats 😄 It's a quality toy. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
전에 다른 노즈워크사고 만족해서 다릇버전으로 구매했어요
이쁘고 작고 다양해서 들고 다니기좋아요
여행갈때 챙겨가려구요
reviews.content_en: I was satisfied with a different nose work toy I bought before, so I purchased this version too. It's cute, compact, and has lots of variety - great to carry around. Planning to bring it on my next trip!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
울집 애기는 노즈워크의 신!!
애기때부터 노즈워크 엄청 좋아해서 어려운것도 금방 뚝딱뚝딱 잘 하는데 바잇미 노즈워크 플레이북을 얼마전에 처음 발견하고 당장 구매했어요
배송오자마자 자기꺼인지 어찌알고 빨리 내놓으라며 빩빩 짖어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 후기사진 찍으려고 앉혀놓으니 언제 줄거냐며 뿔나서 쒹쒹거림 ㅋㅋㅋ
이렇게 어려워보이는 노즈워크는 처음인거같아요
고난이도 노즈워크 많이 만들어주세요!
신나서 할게 눈에 훤해서 제가 다 설레네요 :)♡
reviews.content_en: My pup is a nose work genius!! She's loved nose work since she was a puppy and solves even difficult ones super quickly. I just discovered the BITE ME Nose Work Playbook recently and bought it right away. The moment it arrived, she somehow knew it was hers and started barking demanding I give it to her 😆 When I sat her down to take a photo for this review, she got impatient and started whining asking when she'd get it 😆 This is the first nose work toy that looks this challenging! Please make more high-difficulty nose work toys! Watching her have so much fun with it has me all excited too 🥰♡

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 숨길 곳이 곳곳에 야무지게 있어서 아주 좋네요!! 이런 좋은 노즈워크 용품 더더 만들어주세요 ㅠㅠ 출근할때 아주 많은 도움됩니다
reviews.content_en: There are plenty of hiding spots throughout, which is wonderful!! Please keep making these amazing nose work products 😭 It's a huge help when I'm heading to work.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 전체적으로 귀여운데 디테일이 아쉬워요! 폭죽 노즈워크는 노란줄에 하나는 삼각포켓이 하나만 있고 한줄은 아예 없길래 불량인줄 알았는데 다른분 리뷰 보니깐 정상이네요~ 왜 이렇게 한건지 ㅎㅎㅎ 대칭이 아니여서 프로불편,, ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 끝에 실타래도 너털너털 해서 실사용자분 리뷰 보면 다 풀어헤쳐있길래 끝에 불로 지져줄까 싶어요~ 작은 장난감 안에 다양한 놀이를 담기 위해 마감이 떨어지는건 어쩔수 없나봐요 ㅠ_ㅠ 전체적으론 다양하고 귀여워서 마음에 들어요! 페밀리세일로 13,xxx원대에 구매했는데 이정도 가격이라 마음에 들지 더 비싸게 주고 사기엔 아쉽네용!
reviews.content_en: It's cute overall, but the details are a bit disappointing! With the Firecracker nose work, one of the yellow strings only has one triangular pocket and the other has none at all, so I thought it was defective, but after checking other reviews it seems normal 😅 Not sure why they did it that way though... The asymmetry is a pro inconvenience 😆 The thread at the ends is also frayed - looking at other user reviews, they all seem to come unraveled, so I'm tempted to burn seal the ends 🔥 I guess the finishing can't be perfect when fitting so many different play options into one small toy 😭 Overall I like it because it's diverse and cute! I bought it on a Family Sale for around 13,xxx won, and at that price point I like it, but I wouldn't want to pay full price for it.

reviews.name: t****
reviews.content: 전체적으로 귀여운데 디테일이 아쉬워요! 폭죽 노즈워크는 노란줄에 하나는 삼각포켓이 하나만 있고 한줄은 아예 없길래 불량인줄 알았는데 다른분 리뷰 보니깐 정상이네요~ 왜 이렇게 한건지 ㅎㅎㅎ 대칭이 아니여서 프로불편,, ㅋㅋㅋ 끝에 실타래도 너털너털 해서 실사용자분 리뷰 보면 다 풀어헤쳐있길래 끝에 불로 지져줄까 싶어요~ 작은 장난감 안에 다양한 놀이를 담기 위해 마감이 떨어지는건 어쩔수 없나봐요 ㅠ_ㅠ 전체적으론 다양하고 귀여워서 마음에 들어요! 페밀리세일로 13,xxx원대에 구매했는데 이정도 가격이라 마음에 들지 더 비싸게 주고 사기엔 아쉽네용!
reviews.content_en: It's cute overall, but the details are a bit disappointing! With the Firecracker nose work, one of the yellow strings only has one triangular pocket and the other has none at all, so I thought it was defective, but after checking other reviews it seems normal 😅 Not sure why they did it that way though... The asymmetry is a pro inconvenience 😆 The thread at the ends is also frayed - looking at other user reviews, they all seem to come unraveled, so I'm tempted to burn seal the ends 🔥 I guess the finishing can't be perfect when fitting so many different play options into one small toy 😭 Overall I like it because it's diverse and cute! I bought it on a Family Sale for around 13,xxx won, and at that price point I like it, but I wouldn't want to pay full price for it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
첨엔 어려워하는거같더니 좋아하는간식 넣어주니까 엄청좋아하네요 귀여워요
다른시리즈도 사주려구요
reviews.content_en: At first she seemed to struggle with it, but once I put in her favorite treats she absolutely loves it! It's adorable. Planning to get other series too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
아기 생일선물로 사줬는데 너무 좋아해요
하루에도 몇번씩 하자고 해서 숨겨놔야 할 정도예요 ㅎㅎ
다양한 내용이 있어 지루해 하지않고  자주 하고 싶어해요
다음번에 다른책 구입의사 있습니다.
reviews.content_en: Got it as a birthday gift for my pup and she loves it! She asks to do it several times a day - I have to hide it 😄 There's so much variety that she never gets bored and keeps wanting to do it. I'm planning to buy another book next time.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 플레이북 사고싶었는데 특가로 사서 너무 좋네요 잘도착했습니다
reviews.content_en: I wanted to get PLAYBOOK and I'm so happy I got it on sale! It arrived in great condition.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
잘 갖고 놀아요 ㅎ
근데 간식넣는 곳이 너무 작아서 우리애가 소형견이고 주둥이도 작은데.. 주둥이가 안들어가요 ㅋㅋㅋ
그래서 꺼내먹기가 너무 어려운거 같아요.
먹으려고 난리난리부리다가 겉에 햛고 결국 책이 침으로 다 젖었어요 ㅋㅋㅋ사료가 녹아내렸네요 ㅋㅋ
좀 큰 책으로 제작되었으면 좋겠어요 ㅎ
잘 갖고 노는건 너무 좋은데.. 좀 작아서 아쉬워요 ㅎ
혼자 20분 이상은 갖고 놀아서 너무 좋아요!!
큰 책으로 제작해주세여!! 꼭 살게요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: She plays with it well lol But the treat compartment is way too small, and even though my pup is a small breed with a tiny snout... her snout can't even fit in there ㅋㅋㅋ So it's super hard to get the treats out. She goes crazy trying to eat them and ends up licking the outside, now the whole book is soaked with saliva ㅋㅋㅋ The kibble's all melted ㅋㅋ I wish they made a bigger version of the book ㅎ She plays with it so well and loves it, but it's just a bit small which is a shame ㅎ She plays with it alone for over 20 minutes which is amazing!! Please make a bigger version!! I'll definitely buy it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
색도 너무 이쁘고 저희 아가도 신나서 바로 다 뜯어가며(?) 하느데 괜시리 뿌듯하고 기다린 보람이 있었어요~~😋
재질도 튼튼해서 아가가 발톱으로 긁고 튼튼한 치아로 물어뜯어도 잘 안 뜯어지고 다양하게 노즈워크가 종류별로 가능해서 이 노즈워크북으로만 활용해도 오래 사용할 것 같아요~ 잘쓰겠습니다!! 그리고 베스트 포토리뷰도 기대할게용🐾💕
reviews.content_en: The color is so pretty and my baby got so excited tearing into it right away (?) which made me feel so proud and happy I waited for it~~😋 The material is really durable too—even when my pup scratches it with her nails and bites hard with her teeth, it doesn't tear easily. And there are so many different types of nose work activities possible, so I think I'll be using just this nose work book for a long time~ I'll use it well!! And I'm looking forward to the best photo review too🐾💕

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
너—어무 귀엽고 깜찍항거아닌가여..?
진짜 여기 노즈워크 시리즈로 다있는데
이번에구매한게 제일인듯해요
어쩜 컬러감도 너무 이뻐용 ㅎㅎ
호주에 있는 언니네 강아지 선물용으로 구매하면서 울애기껏도 샀는데 너무이뽀용 ㅜ
reviews.content_en: It's so—incredibly cute and adorable right?? I have the whole BITE ME nose work series honestly but this one I just bought seems like the best one yet honestly the color is so pretty too ㅎㅎ I bought it as a gift for my sister's dog in Australia and got one for my baby too and it's just so pretty ㅜ

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
지금까지 출시된 바잇미 노즈워크 북 모두 갖고있는데, 강쥐가 엄청 좋아해서 새로운 북 나오길 기다리고 있었어요!
도착하자마자 간식숨기는데 빨리 놀고싶다고 점프점하면서 난리난 우리 뚜뚜ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
주자마자 바로바로 찾네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 워낙 노즈워크북 고수가 돼서ㅋㅋ 그래도 기존것보다 시간이 더 걸려요! 더 숨길곳도 많고 고무줄이 긴 천보다 위생적이고 잘 갖고 노네요! 만족합니다^^
너무귀여워요❤️
reviews.content_en: I have all the BITE ME nose work books that have come out so far, and my pup absolutely loves them so I was waiting for a new one to come out! The second it arrived, our Dudu was jumping around wanting to play while I was hiding treats ㅋㅋㅋㅋ He finds them right away ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ He's become such a nose work expert ㅋㅋ but even so it takes longer than the old ones! There are more places to hide treats and the rubber bands with the fabric are more hygienic than before and he plays with it well! Very satisfied ^^ It's so cute ❤️

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content: 노즈워크를 워낙 좋아하는 아이라서 사줘봤어요! 처음에는 책 여는 찍찍이 뜯는걸 어려워하더니 이제는 찍찍이 안열고도 사료를 빼먹네요ㅋㅋㅋ 책 전체를 잡고 흔들어서 사료만 빼먹고있어요ㅎㅎ 아기가 좋아해요 정말!!
reviews.content_en: My pup loves nose work so much so I got it for her! At first she had trouble opening the velcro on the book, but now she's taking out the kibble without even opening the velcro ㅋㅋㅋ She grabs the whole book and shakes it and just eats the kibble ㅎㅎ My baby loves it really!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
여태 바잇미에서 나온 노즈워크 북 크리스마스 빼고 다 모았는데 이번꺼는 진짜 천재강아지인 우리 애기에게 딱 좋아요!!!! 깊숙하게 숨길데가 많아서 다른 노즈워크북 2분 컷인데 이건 길게는 15분도 걸렸어요ㅠㅠ 공부할수록 짧아지겠지만 그때는 다음 시리즈 내주시겠지요? 
아 그리고 이번꺼는 왜때문인지ㅜㅜ 애기 간식 숨길 곳이 다 끈적끈적 풀칠한듯이 그래서  ㅜㅜ 손세탁 해서 말리고 줬어요 ㅠㅠ 그래서 별하나 뺐습니다.. 제 손에도 막 엉겨붙어서 허걱했어요ㅜㅜ 그리고 실밥이..새건데 풀려서 왔어요.. 그래서 별하나 더 뺐습니다ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: I've collected every BITE ME nose work book that came out except for Christmas, and this one is perfect for our super genius pup!!!! There are so many deep hiding spots that other nose work books are done in 2 minutes, but this one took up to 15 minutes ㅠㅠ It'll get shorter as she learns but then you'll release the next series by then right? Oh and this one—I don't know why but ㅜㅜ all the treat hiding spots felt sticky like they were glued, so ㅜㅜ I hand washed and dried it before giving it to her ㅠㅠ So I took off one star... it was even sticking to my hands which freaked me out ㅜㅜ And there were loose threads that came unraveled... so I took off another star ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 애기때 스카우트 구매해줬었는데 요번이 특별전으로 할인하길래 두 권 구매해봤어요.. 근데 우리집 강아지가 이렇게 독서광일줄은... 미쳐날뜁니다...
reviews.content_en: I got Scout for my pup when she was a puppy and they had a special discount this time so I bought two copies.. But I didn't know my dog would be such a bookworm... She's going crazy...

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 이제 막 2개월된 애기 강아지🍼 첫 노즈워크에요! 가지고 놀기에는 아직 사이즈가 크지만 킁킁킁 냄새 맡으면서 간식도 찾아먹고 이리저리 막 들고다니면서 가지고 놀아요ㅋㅋㅋ 특히 바스락 거리는 부분을 가장 좋아하더라구요 좀 더 크면 다른 플레이북도 구매해야할거 같아요🙏🏻💗
reviews.content_en: My puppy just turned 2 months old🍼 First nose work! The size is still a bit big for her to play with but she sniffs and sniffs and finds the treats and carries it around everywhere playing with it ㅋㅋㅋ She especially loves the crinkly part ㅋㅋㅋ I think I'll have to buy other playbooks once she gets bigger 🙏🏻💗

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 런치박스 노즈워크가 너무 쉬운지 너덜너덜해져서ㅋㅋ 새로구매한 플레이북! 갑자기 난이도가 업그레이드 되어 걱정했지만 당황하지않고 열심히 물어뜯고 있네요 ㅋㅋㅋ 내새꾸 넘귀여워
reviews.content_en: The Lunchbox nose work was so easy it got all worn out ㅋㅋ So I got a new PLAYBOOK! I was worried the difficulty suddenly leveled up but she's not fazed and keeps chewing hard on it ㅋㅋㅋ My sweet girl is so cute

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
강아지 분양 받기도 한참 전에, 마켓컬리에서 스카우트를 보고 너무 귀여워서 주문해뒀다가 강아지 2개월에 오자마자부터 (지금은 6개월) 노즈워크를 시킨 열혈 개엄마입니다. ^^;
이제 너무도 잘 알아서 노즈워크 하나 더 사줘야겠다 생각하고있던중 아무리 찾아봐도 바잇미꺼만큼 귀엽고 제 맘에 쏙 드는것을 찾지못해 고민하다가 패밀리세일에 아주 할인 많이 받고 구입했습니다. 바잇미 노즈워크로 우리 모네 똑똑이로 키울게요~ ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I ordered this way before getting my puppy because I saw it on Coupang and thought it was so cute! ^^; I'm a dedicated dog mom who started doing nose work with her from 2 months old (she's 6 months now). I was thinking I need to get another nose work toy since she knows it so well, but no matter how hard I looked, I couldn't find anything as cute and appealing as BITE ME's. So after some thought, I got it on the family sale with a great discount. I'm going to raise our Moné to be a smart girl with BITE ME nose work toys~ ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 이걸 왜 이제서야 샀는지 … 너무좋아하고 노즈워크계의 신세계입니다 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 알뜰살뜰 콕콕 구석구석 숨겨놓을 수 있으니 꼬맹이의 집중력도 업!! 간식 하나하나를 그냥 먹기보다 에너지 소비하고 뇌를 굴려가며 먹는 쵝오의 노즈워크 장난감🙌🏼 다른것도 사야겠어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Why did I buy this so late... She loves it so much and it's a whole new world of nose work games ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ I can hide treats all over the place so carefully, so my little one's focus level goes UP!! Rather than just eating the treats one by one, it's the best nose work toy where she burns energy and uses her brain 🙌🏼 I need to get other ones too ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 이미 있는것도 있는데 할인율이 커서 그냥 샀어요. 열어보니 완전 맘에들어요. 애가 오랜시간동안 물고빨고할거같아서 완전좋아요. 살까말까 괜히 고민했네요. 잘쓸게요!
reviews.content_en: I already have one, but the discount was good so I just bought it anyway. When I opened it, I absolutely loved it. I think my pup will chew and suck on it for a long time, so I'm really happy about it. I was just overthinking whether to buy it or not. I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 드디어 찾았습니다! 단두종 아가들은 이거 정말 필수품이에요ㅜ 그동안 웬만한 노즈워크 장난감들은 머즐보다 눈이 먼저 닿는 바람에 엄두도 못냈는데 바잇미 플레이북은 부드럽고 안전한 천으로 만들어져서 안심하고 놀 수 있습니다. 얼마나 열심히 갖고 노는지 책이 벌써 침범벅이 되버려서 벌스데이북 세탁하는 사이에 런치북 사주려고 들어왔다가 리뷰 남기네요ㅎㅎ 시리즈로 다 살거에요 다른 종류의 플레이북도 많이 만들어주세요~
reviews.content_en: Finally found it! This is absolutely essential for brachycephalic pups ㅜ Until now, most nose work toys had their eyes touching the muzzle first so I couldn't even try them, but BITE ME's Playbook is made of soft and safe fabric so I can let her play worry-free. She plays with it so actively that the book is already dripping with drool, so while I'm washing the Birthday Book, I came in to buy the Lunch Book and ended up leaving a review ㅎㅎ I'm going to buy the whole series. Please make more types of Playbooks~

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content:
벌써 두 번째 플레이북이에요! 첫 번째 플레이북도 정말 잘 가지고 놀아서 이번 것도 고민없이 구매했어요.
강아지가 좋아하고 생각보다 오래 가지고 놀아서 좋아요.
난이도는 대체로 쉽지는 않은 편이나 끈기 있게 집중할 수 있도록 구성된 것 같아요!
새로운 노즈워크 장난감 필요하신 분들에게 추천합니다 🤍
reviews.content_en:
This is already my second Playbook! My pup loved the first one so much that I bought this one without any hesitation.
My dog loves it and plays with it longer than I expected, which is great.
The difficulty level is generally not too easy, but it seems to be designed so she can focus persistently!
I recommend this to anyone who needs a new nose work toy 🤍

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 플레이북 두개는 이미 있는데 구성 할인이 좋아서 선물할 겸 주문했어요! 울 강쥐 최애 장난감 답게 오픈하자마자 달려와서 알아보네요 ㅋㅋㅋ 귀여워죽음 ㅠㅠ 바로 간식 넣어줬더니 오래 가지고 놀아요 햄벅
reviews.content_en: I already have two Playbooks, but the bundle discount was so good that I ordered this as a gift! True to her favorite toy, she came running as soon as I opened it and recognized it ㅋㅋㅋ So cute ㅠㅠ I put treats in right away and she plays with it for a long time 🐶

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
집에 있는 노즈워크를 넘 빨리 꺼내서 사봤어요 아직은 한개도 못빼먹네요ㅠㅠ 흑흑 그래도 집에 물고가서 탐색하고 있어요 잘 가지고 놀 것 같아요

+ 지금 일주일 가지고 놀았는데 으뜸이 장난감이 되었어요ㅋㅋ 장난감 바구니에서 스스로 찾아서 꺼내더라구요 심심할 때마다 책 가지고 놀고 얼마나 씹었는지 풍선이랑 케이크는 벌써 구멍났어요ㅠㅠ 그래서 저는 다른 책도 구입하러 갑니다!
reviews.content_en:
My pup was emptying the nose work toy I had way too quickly so I bought this one. She still hasn't gotten any out yet ㅠㅠ But she's still carrying it around the house and exploring with it. I think she'll play with it well.

+ It's been a week and it's already become her favorite toy ㅋㅋ She finds it herself in the toy basket and takes it out. Every time she's bored, she plays with the book and I can see how much she's chewed—the balloon and cake already have holes ㅠㅠ So I'm going to buy another book!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 십년 키우면서 이때까지 온갖 장난감을 사봤지만 이렇게 좋아하는 장난감은 처음이에요. 소프트 재질의 장난감만 좋아하는 아이들,큰 장난감은 무서운 아이들, 집이 넓지않은 견주들,너무 완벽해요!!!!
reviews.content_en: After 10 years of raising a dog and buying all kinds of toys, this is the first toy she loves this much. Perfect for dogs who only like soft toys, dogs who are scared of big toys, and owners with small spaces!!!!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 노즈워크는 항상 좋아해요~~숨길곳도 많고 좋네요~~그렇게 크지 않아서 보관하기도 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I always love nose work toys~~ There are lots of spots to hide treats and it's great~~ It's not too big so it's easy to store

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
호세 생일파티에 쓰려고 샀어요🥰
고양이라 장난감은 안 가지고 놀았지만, 같이사는 멍멍이가 신나게 갖고 놀았답니다ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
I bought it for José's birthday party 🥰
Since she's a cat, she didn't play with the toy, but the dog living with us had a blast playing with it ㅋㅋ
